race.comment: MALLETIER (7) is going well this campaign and is on the quick turnaround after winning by 0.7L at this track and trip as the race favourite last time out. Pike remains in the saddle and he still rates highly off that effort in defeat. He drops 1kg and can get back to winning ways now. TIMELESS GEM (6) is racing well without winning and rates highly on her recent efforts. He'll need some luck from the draw and Martinan's claim comes in handy. He's shown early speed in the past and if he can get across from the wide alley, he'll be in this for a long way. SIXINCH HEELS (9) was super first-up over 1000m and is better suited out to this trip now. Fiore remains in the saddle and she's won 2/4 at this track and trip previously. Still has some upside and can make an impression second-up. POND MASTER (3) is unbeaten third-up and has to be included on his latest effort. SUNNY HONEY (5) is next best following a strong run here recently.
